cases.title: Participant retrieves first page of own registrations with default pagination
preconditions: Participant registered for at least three events in varied states
Authenticated Participant JWT
steps: Inspect response envelope and first item fields
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with paginated envelope (items, page=1, pageSize=20, total, totalPages); items.length <= 20; each item includes registrationId, eventId, eventName, state, and updatedAt per API design example; satisfies FR-29 paginated list of own registrations across events and FR-31 total count metadata

cases.title: Participant navigates to page 2 of my registrations list
preconditions: Participant with at least 21 registrations across events (exceeds default pageSize of 20)
Authenticated Participant JWT
Registrations seeded with distinct updatedAt values for sort verification
steps: GET /api/v1/me/registrations?page=1&pageSize=20 and record total and totalPages
Compare page-2 items to expected second slice ordered by updatedAt descending
cases.expected: Page-2 response has page=2, pageSize=20, total matching page-1 total, totalPages=ceil(total/20), items are the correct contiguous slice per testing plan my registrations paginated scenario and AC-13

cases.title: My registrations list aggregates registrations across multiple events
preconditions: Participant registered for Event A (Registered) and Event B (Waitlisted) and Event C (CancelledByUser)
Authenticated Participant JWT
steps: Verify items reference three distinct eventId values with correct eventName and state per event
cases.expected: Single paginated response contains registrations from all enrolled events; each row ties registration to its event via eventId and eventName; cross-event aggregation satisfies FR-29 view registrations across events

cases.title: Participant filters my registrations list by registration state
preconditions: Participant with at least one Registered and one Waitlisted registration
Authenticated Participant JWT
cases.expected: Registered filter returns only items with state Registered; Waitlisted filter returns only Waitlisted items; total reflects filtered row count; optional state filter on GET /me/registrations per API paginated list endpoints table

cases.title: My registrations default sort orders by updatedAt descending
preconditions: Participant with at least three registrations with known updatedAt timestamps
Authenticated Participant JWT
cases.expected: Default sort updatedAt:desc applied; most recently updated registration appears first; matches API design default sort for GET /me/registrations

cases.title: My registrations list includes current and past registration states
preconditions: Participant with active Registered registration and terminal CancelledByUser or Expired registration
Authenticated Participant JWT
steps: Locate items for active and terminal-state registrations
cases.expected: Both current (active) and past (terminal) registrations appear in the list with correct state values; page list requirement to list current and past registrations with status is satisfied

cases.title: My Registrations page renders server-driven paginated status list
preconditions: Participant with more than 20 registrations across events
Authenticated participant on /registrations (My Registrations) route
steps: Verify pagination controls and registration rows are visible
Click Next to advance to page 2
Observe network requests during page change
cases.expected: Page renders at most pageSize registration rows with event name and status; prev/next pagination controls present; page change triggers single GET /me/registrations with updated page parameter per page list and AC-14 server-driven listing

cases.title: My Registrations page shows status timeline and contextual quick actions
preconditions: Participant with Registered registration eligible for check-in and Attended registration eligible for feedback
Authenticated participant on My Registrations page
steps: Inspect registration row for check-in-eligible event
Inspect registration row for feedback-eligible event
cases.expected: Each row displays registration status timeline or status badge; check-in quick action visible when window open and state permits; feedback quick action visible when applicable per page list My registrations requirements

cases.title: My registrations service returns paginated envelope with correct total and page boundaries
preconditions: Known count of registrations for participant (e.g. 25 total across events)
Participant actor context
PostgreSQL test database with seeded registrations ordered by updatedAt desc
steps: Invoke participant registration list service with { page: 1, pageSize: 20 }
Invoke same service with { page: 2, pageSize: 20 }
Compare items.length, total, and totalPages to seeded row count
cases.expected: Page 1 returns total=25, totalPages=2, items.length=20; page 2 returns items.length=5; total reflects full matching count before paging per integration target paginated list queries and FR-31

cases.title: My registrations page beyond last page returns empty items with valid metadata
preconditions: Participant with five registrations (totalPages=1 at default pageSize 20)
Authenticated Participant JWT
cases.expected: Page beyond totalPages returns items: [] with unchanged total, totalPages, page, and pageSize per AC-13 paginated list boundary behavior for GET /me/registrations

cases.title: Invalid pagination parameters on my registrations return 400 INVALID_PAGINATION
preconditions: Authenticated Participant JWT
Participant with at least one registration
cases.expected: Each invalid request returns HTTP 400 with error code INVALID_PAGINATION; no partial registration data returned; pagination contract enforces page >= 1 and pageSize max 100

cases.title: Participant with no registrations receives empty paginated envelope
preconditions: Newly registered participant with zero event registrations
Authenticated Participant JWT
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with items: [], total=0, totalPages=0 (or equivalent), page=1, pageSize=20; empty registration history is a valid outcome with intact envelope

cases.title: State filter with no matching registrations returns empty items
preconditions: Participant with only Registered registrations (no Waitlisted)
Authenticated Participant JWT
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with items: [], total=0, and valid page metadata; filter applied before paging without leaking non-matching states

cases.title: Unauthenticated my registrations API request returns 401
preconditions: API running
No Authorization header
cases.expected: HTTP 401 with typed error envelope; unauthenticated access to protected GET /me/registrations rejected per AC-15

cases.title: My Registrations empty state shown when participant has no registrations
preconditions: Authenticated participant with zero registrations
My Registrations route available
steps: Observe list region and pagination controls
cases.expected: Page shows empty state messaging (not an error); no registration rows rendered; pagination hidden or indicates zero total; user can navigate to event discovery to register

cases.title: My registrations never returns more than pageSize items per request
preconditions: Participant with more than 500 registrations across events (or maximum practical seed count exceeding pageSize)
Authenticated Participant JWT
cases.expected: Each response items.length <= pageSize regardless of total row count; satisfies testing plan registrations list beyond capacity scenario and NFR-16 single-page constraint

cases.title: My registrations listing served by single paginated API call without N+1 fan-out
preconditions: Participant with registrations across multiple events
Authenticated participant JWT
Ability to observe API calls during my registrations list load
steps: Load my registrations data via service or HTTP for page 1
Count list endpoint calls during the operation
Verify no per-event registration-status or event-detail fan-out loops
cases.expected: Exactly one paginated GET /me/registrations call serves the list; no per-event registration fetch loops per testing plan my registrations paginated scenario and AC-14 server-driven requirement

cases.title: My registrations endpoint returns single page within acceptable time when total exceeds 500
preconditions: Database seeded with >500 registrations for one participant across events
Authenticated Participant JWT
Normal load test environment per NFR-16
steps: Confirm response contains only one page of items with correct total metadata
cases.expected: Response completes within acceptable response time threshold for paginated list endpoints; items.length=20; total reflects full count without returning all rows in one payload per NFR-16 and database index on participant_id, updated_at DESC
